TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dan Amboyer kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 12, Dan Amboyer, squliq na Bunge'. Dan Amboyer ,Claudi ru Donald Amboyer msqun hintgan maki Detroit. raral ga,hiya mqwas beh Roeper ru Interlochen pqwasan biru.suruw lga hiya tmasoq biru maki Carnegie Mellon pqwasan.tmasoq mqwas lga,musa maki Nork York. Amboyer mhtuw maki cingay TV ru ega'. hiya ga tequtux squilq maki Theatre kosi Exit. 2017 kawas 10 byacing 7 ryax skayal tnaq mlikuy (Eric P.Berger) msqun la. soni hngan qani ga,cyux tktan kwara mhtuw Access Hollywood,E!telivi. 2019 kawas 11 byacing 4 ryax,hiya skayal nya mha cyux kian Berger la maki Instagram. hiya laqi mlikuy(Theodore Carl Amboyer-Berger) nya hintgan 2019 kawas 12 byacing 23 ryax. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *an amβojer kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *an amβojer, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. *an amβojer ,ʦ~ʨlau*i ru *onal* amβojer ms~ɕqun ħintɣan maki *etroit. raral ɣa,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ roeper ru interloʦ~ʨħen pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa ħija tmas~ɕoq βiru maki ʦ~ʨarneɣie mellon pqwas~ɕan.tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ lɣa,mus~ɕa maki nork jork. amβojer mħtuw maki ʦ~ʨiŋaj t* ru eɣaʔ. ħija ɣa tequtux s~ɕquilq maki tħeatre kos~ɕi exit. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax s~ɕkajal tnaq mlikuj (eriʦ~ʨ p.βerɣer) ms~ɕqun la. s~ɕoni ħŋan qani ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux tktan kwara mħtuw aʦ~ʨʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ ħolljwoo*,e!teli*i. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,ħija s~ɕkajal nja mħa ʦ~ʨjux kian βerɣer la maki ins~ɕtaɣram. ħija laqi mlikuj(tħeo*ore ʦ~ʨarl amβojer-βerɣer) nja ħintɣan **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Dan Amboyer kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 12, Dan Amboyer, squliq na Bunge'. Dan Amboyer ,Claudi ru Donald Amboyer msqun hintgan maki Detroit. raral ga,hiya mqwas beh Roeper ru Interlochen pqwasan biru.suruw lga hiya tmasoq biru maki Carnegie Mellon pqwasan.tmasoq mqwas lga,musa maki Nork York. Amboyer mhtuw maki cingay TV ru ega'. hiya ga tequtux squilq maki Theatre kosi Exit. 2017 kawas 10 byacing 7 ryax skayal tnaq mlikuy (Eric P.Berger) msqun la. soni hngan qani ga,cyux tktan kwara mhtuw Access Hollywood,E!telivi. 2019 kawas 11 byacing 4 ryax,hiya skayal nya mha cyux kian Berger la maki Instagram. hiya laqi mlikuy(Theodore Carl Amboyer-Berger) nya hintgan 2019 kawas 12 byacing 23 ryax. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *an amβojer kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *an amβojer, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. *an amβojer ,ʦ~ʨlau*i ru *onal* amβojer ms~ɕqun ħintɣan maki *etroit. raral ɣa,ħija mqwas~ɕ βeħ roeper ru interloʦ~ʨħen pqwas~ɕan βiru.s~ɕuruw lɣa ħija tmas~ɕoq βiru maki ʦ~ʨarneɣie mellon pqwas~ɕan.tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ lɣa,mus~ɕa maki nork jork. amβojer mħtuw maki ʦ~ʨiŋaj t* ru eɣaʔ. ħija ɣa tequtux s~ɕquilq maki tħeatre kos~ɕi exit. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax s~ɕkajal tnaq mlikuj (eriʦ~ʨ p.βerɣer) ms~ɕqun la. s~ɕoni ħŋan qani ɣa,ʦ~ʨjux tktan kwara mħtuw aʦ~ʨʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ ħolljwoo*,e!teli*i. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,ħija s~ɕkajal nja mħa ʦ~ʨjux kian βerɣer la maki ins~ɕtaɣram. ħija laqi mlikuj(tħeo*ore ʦ~ʨarl amβojer-βerɣer) nja ħintɣan **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
